productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Raggmo Grey Flip Flops
description: Need to look stylish when you're hanging out by the pool this summer? Grab these Raggmo Thong flip flops from adidas and enjoy the easy comfort of these hot weather essentials. Upper Padded synthetic straps with stitched detailing in a thong-style shape Printed branding on the strap and footbed Soft quick-dry sport footbed Outsole Triangular lugs on the sides and grooves on the sides Flip flop care Use a cloth to remove dust and dirt
